title: AutoCog artifact metadata
description: Universal metadata block carried by every generated AutoCog artifact (STA, FTA, FTT, and the syntax/search configs once stored). STL source files, and the `--ir` debug dump, have no metadata block.

format.description: Discriminator; identifies which schema governs this artifact.

version.description: AutoCog project version that produced this artifact.

hash.description: SHA-256 of this artifact's content combined with its top-level provenance (the metadata block itself is not an input to the hash).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of artifact creation.
